sql1: SELECT ITM.ITEMN, ITPV.VENDN FROM ITM ITM, (SELECT DISTINCT ITP.ITEMN, PUR.VENDN FROM ITP ITP, PUR PUR WHERE ITP.PONUM = PUR.PONUM AND PUR.ODATE > 85) ITPV WHERE ITM.ITEMN = ITPV.ITEMN AND ITM.ITEMN > 1 AND ITM.ITEMN < 20
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT ITM.ITEMN, PUR.VENDN FROM ITM ITM, ITP ITP, PUR PUR WHERE ITP.PONUM = PUR.PONUM AND ITM.ITEMN = ITP.ITEMN AND PUR.ODATE > 85 AND ITM.ITEMN > 1 AND ITM.ITEMN < 20

sql1: SELECT Z.A, Z.B FROM R1 X, R2 Y, R2 Z WHERE X.A = Y.A AND Y.A = Z.A AND X.A = Z.A AND Y.B = Z.B
sql2: SELECT Z.A, Z.B FROM R1 X, R2 Y, R2 Z WHERE X.A = Y.A AND Y.A = Z.A AND X.A = Z.A

sql1: SELECT ITEMPRICE.NP, ITM.TYPE, ITM.ITEMNO FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ITP.ITEMNO AS ITN, ITP.NP AS NP FROM ITP ITP WHERE ITP.NP > 1000) ITEMPRICE, ITM ITM WHERE ITEMPRICE.ITN = ITM.ITEMNO
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT ITP.NP, ITM.TYPE, ITM.ITEMNO FROM ITP ITP, ITM ITM WHERE ITP.NP > 1000 AND ITP.ITEMNO = ITM.ITEMNO

sql1: SELECT ITM.ITEMNO, ITEMPRICE.NP FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ITP.ITEMNO AS ITN, ITP.NP AS NP FROM ITP ITP) ITEMPRICE, ITM ITM WHERE ITEMPRICE.ITN = ITM.ITEMNO
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT ITM.ITEMNO, ITP.NP FROM ITP ITP, ITM ITM WHERE ITP.ITEMNO = ITM.ITEMNO

sql1: SELECT * FROM ITP ITP WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM ITL ITL WHERE ITL.ITEMN = ITP.ITEMN AND ITL.WKCEN = 468 AND ITL.LOCAN = 0)
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT ITP.* FROM ITP ITP, ITL ITL WHERE ITP.ITEMN = ITL.ITEMN AND ITL.WKCEN = 468 AND ITL.LOCAN = 0

sql1: SELECT T.TMEMBER FROM DEPTS D, TEAMS T WHERE D.DPROJ = T.TPROJ AND D.DNAME = 'SECURITY'
sql2: SELECT V1.E FROM (SELECT D.DNAME AS D, D.DPROJ AS P, P.EMPL AS E FROM DEPTS D, PAYROLL P WHERE D.DNAME = P.PDEPT) V1, (SELECT T.TMEMBER AS E, P.PDEPT AS D, T.TPROJ AS P FROM TEAMS T, PAYROLL P WHERE T.TMEMBER = P.EMPL) V2 WHERE V1.D = 'SECURITY' AND V1.P = V2.P AND V1.E = V2.E AND V1.D = V2.D

sql1: SELECT Y.* FROM PAYROLL X, APPLICANT Y WHERE X.SSNO = Y.SSNO AND X.DEPTNO = 29
sql2: SELECT C.* FROM PAYROLL A, (SELECT Y.SSNO, Y.DEPTNO FROM PAYROLL Y) B, APPLICANT C WHERE A.SSNO = B.SSNO AND C.SSNO = A.SSNO AND B.DEPTNO = 29

sql1: SELECT X.NAME AS XN FROM EMP X WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM DEPT Y WHERE Y.LOC = 3 AND X.EMP = Y.MGR AND X.DEPT = Y.DEPT)
sql2: SELECT X.NAME AS XN FROM EMP X, DEPT Y WHERE X.DEPT = Y.DEPT AND Y.LOC = 3 AND X.EMP = Y.MGR

sql1: SELECT X.B AS XB FROM R X WHERE X.A = 5 AND X.C < 1
sql2: SELECT X.B AS XB FROM R X WHERE X.A < 10

sql1: SELECT X.UID AS UID, X.UNAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PICTURE Y WHERE X.UID = Y.UID AND Y.SIZE > 1000000) AS CNT FROM USER X WHERE X.CITY = 3
sql2: SELECT X.UID AS UID, X.UNAME AS UNAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER X, PICTURE Y WHERE X.UID = Y.UID AND Y.SIZE > 1000000 AND X.CITY = 3 GROUP BY X.UID, X.UNAME

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT X.USRUID AS XID, X.USRNAME AS XNAME FROM USR X, PIC U, PIC V, PIC W WHERE X.USRUID = U.PICUID AND X.USRUID = V.PICUID AND X.USRUID = W.PICUID AND W.PICSIZE = V.PICSIZE AND B1(U) AND B2(V)
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT X.USRUID AS XID, X.USRNAME AS XNAME FROM USR X, PIC U, PIC V WHERE X.USRUID = U.PICUID AND X.USRUID = V.PICUID AND B1(U) AND B2(V)

sql1: SELECT X.UID AS XU, X.UNAME AS XN, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CT FROM PIC Y FROM X.UID = Y.UID AND Y.SIZE > 100000) AS CNT FROM USR X WHERE X.CITY = 3
sql2: SELECT X.UID AS XU, X.NAME AS XN, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USR X, PIC Y WHERE X.UID = Y.UID AND Y.SIZE > 100000 GROUP BY X.UID, X.UNAME

sql1: SELECT X.PNUM AS XP FROM PARTS X WHERE X.QOH = (SELECT COUNT(Y.SHIPDATE) AS CNT FROM SUPPLY Y WHERE Y.PNUM = X.PNUM AND Y.SHIPDATE < 10)
sql2: SELECT X.PNUM AS XP FROM PARTS X, (SELECT Y.PNUM AS SUPPNUM, COUNT(Y.SHIPDATE) AS CT FROM SUPPLY Y WHERE Y.SHIPDATE < 10 GROUP BY Y.PNUM) TEMP WHERE X.QOH = TEMP.CT AND X.PNUM = TEMP.SUPPNUM

sql1: SELECT X.NAME AS XN FROM EMP X WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM DEPT Y WHERE Y.LOC = 3 AND X.EMP = Y.MGR AND X.DEPT = Y.DEPT)
sql2: SELECT X.NAME AS XN FROM EMP X

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT X.X AS AX FROM A X, B Y WHERE X.YA = Y.YB
sql2: (SELECT X.X AS AX FROM A X, A Y, B Z WHERE X.X = Y.X AND X.YA = Z.YB) UNION ALL (SELECT 1 AS AX FROM A X WHERE 1 = 0)

sql1: SELECT X.X AS AX FROM A X WHERE X.YX = 'HELLO'
sql2: SELECT X.X AS AX FROM A X WHERE X.YX = 'HELLO HI'

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT X.X AS X FROM R1 X, R2 Y WHERE X.Y = Y.Y AND X.X = 1
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT X.X AS X FROM R1 X, R1 Y, R2 Z WHERE X.X = Y.X AND X.Y = Z.Y AND X.X = 1

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT * FROM R X WHERE X.A1 = X.A2 AND X.A2 = X.A3
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT * FROM R X WHERE X.A1 = X.A2 AND X.A1 = X.A3

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT X.* FROM R X, R Y
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT X.* FROM R X

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT Y.A AS A FROM R X, R Y WHERE X.A = Y.A
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT X.A AS A FROM R X

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT Y.A1 AS A1, Y.A2 AS A2 FROM R X, R Y WHERE X.A1 = Y.A1 AND X.A2 = Y.A2
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT X.A1 AS A1, X.A2 AS A2 FROM R X

sql1: SELECT X.A, SUM(X.A + X.B) FROM R X GROUP BY X.A
sql2: SELECT Y.A, SUM(Y.A + Y.B) FROM R Y GROUP BY Y.A

sql1: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B1(X)) Y WHERE B2(Y)
sql2: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B2(X)) Y WHERE B1(Y)

sql1: SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B1(X) AND B2(X)
sql2: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B1(X)) Y WHERE B2(Y)

sql1: SELECT COUNT(*) AS A FROM R X
sql2: SELECT COUNT(Y.B) FROM R Y

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT * FROM R X WHERE B1(X) OR B2(X)
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ((SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B1(X)) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM R Y WHERE B2(Y))) X

sql1: SELECT DEPT.NAME AS DNAME, COUNT(*) AS C FROM DEPT AS DEPT GROUP BY DEPT.NAME HAVING DEPT.NAME = 10
sql2: SELECT T2.DNAME, T2.CNT AS C FROM (SELECT DEPT0.NAME AS DNAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM DEPT AS DEPT0 GROUP BY DEPT0.NAME) AS T2 WHERE T2.DNAME = 10

sql1: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B(X)) Y WHERE B(Y)
sql2: SELECT * FROM R X WHERE B(X)

sql1: SELECT * FROM A X WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM A Y WHERE X.C = Y.C)
sql2: SELECT * FROM A X

sql1: SELECT X.A1 AS A1, X.A2 AS A2, Y.B1 AS B1, Y.B2 AS B2 FROM A X, B Y WHERE X.A1 = Y.B1
sql2: SELECT Y.A1 AS A1, Y.A2 AS A2, X.B1 AS B1, X.B2 AS B2 FROM B X, A Y WHERE Y.A1 = X.B1

sql1: SELECT * FROM R1 X, (R2 UNION ALL R3) Y
sql2: (SELECT * FROM R1 X, R2 Y) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM R1 X, R3 Y)

sql1: SELECT X.B AS XB, Y.B AS YB FROM R1 X, R2 Y
sql2: SELECT X1.XB AS XB, Y1.YB AS YB FROM (SELECT X.B AS XB FROM R1 X) X1, (SELECT Y.B AS YB FROM R2 Y) Y1

sql1: SELECT * FROM (R UNION ALL S) X
sql2: (SELECT * FROM R X) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM S Y)

sql1: SELECT * FROM A X, (SELECT * FROM B Y WHERE B0(Y)) Z WHERE B1(X, Z)
sql2: SELECT * FROM A X, B Y WHERE B1(X, Y) AND B0(Y)

sql1: SELECT X.A AS A FROM X X, Y Y WHERE X.K = Y.K
sql2: SELECT X1.A AS X1A FROM (SELECT X.A AS A, X.K AS K FROM X X) X1, Y Y WHERE X1.K = Y.K

sql1: SELECT * FROM R1 X, (SELECT * FROM R2 Y WHERE B(Y)) Z
sql2: SELECT * FROM R1 X, R2 Y WHERE B(Y)

sql1: SELECT X.A + X.B, X.A/X.B AS A FROM R X
sql2: SELECT Y.A + Y.B, Y.A/Y.B AS A FROM R Y

sql1: SELECT * FROM A X UNION ALL SELECT * FROM A X WHERE FALSE
sql2: SELECT * FROM A X

sql1: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(C.CREDITS) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(C.CREDITS) > 10 AND COUNT(DISTINCT C.CREDITS) > 5
sql2: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(C.CREDITS) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(C.CREDITS) > 10 AND COUNT(DISTINCT C.CREDITS) > 8

sql1: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, AVG(I.SALARY) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (C.COURSE_ID = T.COURSE_ID) INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON (D.DEPT_NAME = I.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING AVG(I.SALARY)>50000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT I.SALARY)=4
sql2: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, AVG(I.SALARY) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (C.COURSE_ID = T.COURSE_ID) INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON (D.DEPT_NAME = I.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING AVG(I.SALARY)>50000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT I.SALARY)>4

sql1: SELECT STUDENT.ID FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT NATURAL JOIN STUDENT NATURAL JOIN TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY STUDENT.ID,STUDENT.DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DEPT_NAME) > 1
sql2: SELECT STUDENT.ID FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT NATURAL JOIN STUDENT NATURAL JOIN TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY STUDENT.ID,STUDENT.DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DEPT_NAME) >= 2

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE WHERE CREDITS = (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT WHERE TITLE='CS' GROUP BY DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COURSE_ID)>4)
sql2: SELECT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE WHERE CREDITS = (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT WHERE TITLE='CS' GROUP BY DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COURSE_ID)>4)

sql1: SELECT STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME FROM STUDENT JOIN (SELECT TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR FROM TAKES JOIN SECTION AS S ON TAKES.COURSE_ID = S.COURSE_ID AND TAKES.SEC_ID = S.SEC_ID GROUP BY TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR HAVING COUNT(S.TIME_SLOT_ID) > 1) AS A ON STUDENT.ID = A.ID GROUP BY STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT STUDENT.ID) > 2
sql2: SELECT STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME FROM STUDENT JOIN (SELECT TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR FROM TAKES JOIN SECTION AS S ON TAKES.COURSE_ID = S.COURSE_ID AND TAKES.SEC_ID = S.SEC_ID GROUP BY TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR HAVING SUM(S.TIME_SLOT_ID) > 1) AS A ON STUDENT.ID = A.ID GROUP BY STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT STUDENT.ID) > 2

sql1: SELECT SUM(T) AS SU FROM (SELECT YEAR AS T FROM TEACHES NATURAL JOIN INSTRUCTOR GROUP BY YEAR, COURSE_ID HAVING COUNT(ID)>4) AS TEMP GROUP BY T
sql2: SELECT SUM(T) AS SU FROM (SELECT YEAR AS T FROM TEACHES NATURAL JOIN INSTRUCTOR GROUP BY YEAR HAVING COUNT(ID)>4) AS TEMP GROUP BY T

sql1: WITH S AS (SELECT ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR FROM TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR HAVING COUNT(TIME_SLOT_ID)>4) SELECT DISTINCT ID,NAME FROM S NATURAL JOIN STUDENT
sql2: WITH S AS (SELECT ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR FROM TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR HAVING COUNT(TIME_SLOT_ID)>5) SELECT DISTINCT ID,NAME FROM S NATURAL JOIN STUDENT

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE JOIN (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) AS MAX_CREDITS FROM COURSE) AS A ON COURSE.CREDITS = A.MAX_CREDITS
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE JOIN (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) AS MAX_CREDITS FROM COURSE GROUP BY DEPT_NAME) AS A ON COURSE.CREDITS = A.MAX_CREDITS

sql1: SELECT C.NAME FROM CARRIERS AS C JOIN FLIGHTS AS F ON C.CID = F.CARRIER_ID GROUP BY C.NAME, F.YEAR, F.MONTH_ID, F.DAY_OF_MONTH HAVING COUNT(F.FID) > 1000
sql2: SELECT C.NAME FROM CARRIERS AS C JOIN FLIGHTS AS F ON C.CID = F.CARRIER_ID GROUP BY C.NAME, F.DAY_OF_MONTH HAVING COUNT(C.CID) > 1000

sql1: SELECT C.NAME FROM CARRIERS AS C JOIN FLIGHTS AS F ON C.CID = F.CARRIER_ID GROUP BY C.CID, C.NAME, F.YEAR, F.MONTH_ID, F.DAY_OF_MONTH HAVING COUNT(F.FID) > 1000
sql2: SELECT C.NAME FROM CARRIERS AS C JOIN FLIGHTS AS F ON C.CID = F.CARRIER_ID GROUP BY C.NAME, F.DAY_OF_MONTH HAVING COUNT(F.FID) > 1000

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT F.ORIGIN_CITY, F.DEST_CITY, F.ACTUAL_TIME FROM FLIGHTS AS F, (SELECT A.ORIGIN_CITY, MAX(A.ACTUAL_TIME) AS MAX_TIME FROM FLIGHTS AS A GROUP BY A.ORIGIN_CITY) AS X ON F.ORIGIN_CITY = X.ORIGIN_CITY AND F.ACTUAL_TIME = X.MAX_TIME
sql2: SELECT S.ORIGIN_CITY, F2.DEST_CITY, MAX(F2.ACTUAL_TIME) FROM (SELECT F1.ORIGIN_CITY, MAX(F1.ACTUAL_TIME) AS MAX_TIME FROM FLIGHTS AS F1 GROUP BY F1.ORIGIN_CITY) AS S, FLIGHTS AS F2 ON S.ORIGIN_CITY = F2.ORIGIN_CITY AND F2.ACTUAL_TIME = S.MAX_TIME GROUP BY S.ORIGIN_CITY, F2.DEST_CITY

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT F.ORIGIN_CITY, F.DEST_CITY, F.ACTUAL_TIME FROM FLIGHTS AS F JOIN (SELECT A.ORIGIN_CITY, MAX(A.ACTUAL_TIME) AS MAX_TIME FROM FLIGHTS AS A GROUP BY A.ORIGIN_CITY) AS X ON F.ORIGIN_CITY = X.ORIGIN_CITY AND F.ACTUAL_TIME = X.MAX_TIME
sql2: SELECT F1.ORIGIN_CITY, F1.DEST_CITY, F1.ACTUAL_TIME FROM FLIGHTS AS F1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS F2 ON F1.ORIGIN_CITY = F2.ORIGIN_CITY GROUP BY F1.ORIGIN_CITY, F1.DEST_CITY, F1.ACTUAL_TIME HAVING F1.ACTUAL_TIME = MAX(F2.ACTUAL_TIME)

sql1: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(C.CREDITS) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(C.CREDITS)>10 AND COUNT(C.CREDITS)>5
sql2: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(C.CREDITS) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(C.CREDITS)>10 AND COUNT(C.CREDITS)>8

sql1: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(I.SALARY) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON (D.DEPT_NAME = I.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(I.SALARY)>100 AND MAX(I.SALARY)<75
sql2: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(I.SALARY) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON (D.DEPT_NAME = I.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(I.SALARY)>=100 AND MAX(I.SALARY)<75

sql1: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(D.BUDGET) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (C.COURSE_ID = T.COURSE_ID) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(D.BUDGET)>100000 AND COUNT(D.BUDGET)>10
sql2: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, SUM(D.BUDGET) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (C.COURSE_ID = T.COURSE_ID) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING SUM(D.BUDGET)>100000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT D.BUDGET)>10

sql1: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, AVG(I.SALARY) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (C.COURSE_ID = T.COURSE_ID) INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON (D.DEPT_NAME = I.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING AVG(I.SALARY)>50000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT I.SALARY)=4
sql2: SELECT C.DEPT_NAME, AVG(I.SALARY) FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (C.COURSE_ID = T.COURSE_ID) INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON (D.DEPT_NAME = I.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY C.DEPT_NAME HAVING AVG(I.SALARY)>50000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT I.SALARY)>4

sql1: SELECT T.SEMESTER, SUM(C.CREDITS) FROM DEPARTMENT D INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (D.BUDGET = T.YEAR + 4) INNER JOIN COURSE C ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY T.SEMESTER HAVING AVG(C.CREDITS)>2 AND COUNT(D.BUILDING)=2
sql2: SELECT T.SEMESTER, SUM(C.CREDITS) FROM DEPARTMENT D INNER JOIN TEACHES T ON (D.BUDGET = T.YEAR + 4) INNER JOIN COURSE C ON (C.DEPT_NAME = D.DEPT_NAME) GROUP BY T.SEMESTER HAVING AVG(C.CREDITS)>2 AND COUNT(D.BUILDING)>=2

sql1: SELECT ID FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT NATURAL JOIN STUDENT NATURAL JOIN TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY ID,DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DEPT_NAME) > 1
sql2: SELECT ID FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT NATURAL JOIN STUDENT NATURAL JOIN TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY ID,DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DEPT_NAME) >= 2

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE WHERE CREDITS = (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT WHERE TITLE='CS' GROUP BY DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(COURSE_ID)>2)
sql2: SELECT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE WHERE CREDITS = (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN DEPARTMENT WHERE TITLE='CS' GROUP BY DEPT_NAME HAVING COUNT(COURSE_ID)>2)

sql1: SELECT STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME FROM STUDENT JOIN (SELECT TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR FROM TAKES JOIN SECTION AS S ON TAKES.COURSE_ID = S.COURSE_ID AND TAKES.SEC_ID = S.SEC_ID GROUP BY TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR HAVING COUNT(S.TIME_SLOT_ID) > 1) AS A ON STUDENT.ID = A.ID GROUP BY STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT STUDENT.ID) > 2
sql2: SELECT STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME FROM STUDENT JOIN (SELECT TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR FROM TAKES JOIN SECTION AS S ON TAKES.COURSE_ID = S.COURSE_ID AND TAKES.SEC_ID = S.SEC_ID GROUP BY TAKES.ID, S.TIME_SLOT_ID, S.YEAR HAVING SUM(S.TIME_SLOT_ID) > 1) AS A ON STUDENT.ID = A.ID GROUP BY STUDENT.ID, STUDENT.NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT STUDENT.ID) > 2

sql1: SELECT SUM(T) AS SU FROM (SELECT YEAR AS T FROM TEACHES NATURAL JOIN INSTRUCTOR GROUP BY YEAR, COURSE_ID HAVING COUNT(ID)>4) AS TEMP GROUP BY T
sql2: SELECT SUM(T) AS SU FROM (SELECT YEAR AS T FROM TEACHES NATURAL JOIN INSTRUCTOR GROUP BY YEAR HAVING COUNT(ID)>4) AS TEMP GROUP BY T

sql2: SELECT COURSE_ID, TITLE FROM COURSE WHERE CREDITS > 3

sql1: SELECT DISTINCT COURSE.COURSE_ID, COURSE.TITLE, TEACHES.ID FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN TEACHES WHERE COURSE.COURSE_ID = TEACHES.COURSE_ID AND TEACHES.YEAR = 2010
sql2: SELECT DISTINCT COURSE.COURSE_ID, COURSE.TITLE, TEACHES.ID FROM COURSE NATURAL JOIN TEACHES WHERE COURSE.COURSE_ID >= TEACHES.COURSE_ID AND TEACHES.YEAR = 2010

sql2: SELECT DISTINCT INSTRUCTOR.ID, INSTRUCTOR.NAME, TEACHES.COURSE_ID FROM INSTRUCTOR, TEACHES WHERE INSTRUCTOR.ID = TEACHES.ID

sql1: WITH S AS (SELECT ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR FROM TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TIME_SLOT_ID)>4) SELECT DISTINCT ID,NAME FROM S NATURAL JOIN STUDENT
sql2: WITH S AS (SELECT ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR FROM TAKES NATURAL JOIN SECTION GROUP BY ID, TIME_SLOT_ID, YEAR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TIME_SLOT_ID)>5) SELECT DISTINCT ID,NAME FROM S NATURAL JOIN STUDENT

sql2: SELECT DISTINCT DEPT_NAME FROM COURSE AS C JOIN (SELECT MAX(CREDITS) AS MAX_CREDITS FROM COURSE GROUP BY DEPT_NAME) AS A WHERE C.CREDITS = A.MAX_CREDITS
